The '''Aerial Plankton Uprising''' was a conflict in which [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gordun]] and the [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] fought together against the [[Kinkee]]s. The uprising was mentioned in the "About the Author" section of Ebenn's [[Book/Legends|book]], [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']].<ref name="GPBaTG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Aerial [[Plankton/Legends|Plankton]] Uprising was first mentioned in [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], which was written by [[Ben Burtt]] and released in [[2001]]. The book did not give a [[Time/Legends|time]] frame for the uprising.
